name: wrangle-codex
description: Offload Codex tasks through wrangle with consistent backend and model routing.

interface.shortDescription: Route tasks through wrangle to other agent harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Use wrangle to offload Codex tasks to supported backends like Opencode, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, or Codex itself without narrating intermediate subprocess output.
defaultPrompt: Use wrangle to tell opencode to review this Rust crate.
Tell claude with claude-sonnet-4-6 to write release notes.
